---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement for Bizarre CRM
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected (repair techs, shop owners, customers)?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Scope

- [ ] Server (Express / SQLite)
- [ ] Web UI (React)
- [ ] Android app
- [ ] iOS app
- [ ] Cross-platform (needs coordination — see `TODO.md` `CROSS-PLATFORM` section)

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional context

Mockups, links to related tickets, references to similar features elsewhere.
